creator: marquis@roble.com
text: Two days ago the mail/dovecot port was upgraded from 1.0.r7_2 to 1.0.rc10.  This broke SASL and other authentication mechanisms on servers using x/inetd.  Recommend rolling back to r7_2 ASAP and branch off the RCs, which are actually beta releases, into a separate port (dovecot-beta). This is the second time in four upgrades we've had to restore from the previous release.
